info.name: Smart Railway Ticketing System API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for Smart Railway Ticketing System v2.0

Base URL: {{baseUrl}}
Authentication: Bearer Token (JWT)

## Setup Instructions:
1. Set `baseUrl` variable to your server URL
2. Run 'Auth > Login' to get token
3. Token is auto-saved to `authToken` variable
4. All authenticated requests use this token automatically

item.name: 01. Authentication

request.description:
Register a new user account.

**Rate Limit:** 10 requests/hour

Login with email and password.

**Rate Limit:** 10 requests/15 minutes
Login as admin user for admin operations.
Validate current JWT token and return user data.
Get new access token using refresh token.
Update current user's profile.
Change current user's password.
Logout user (client should discard tokens).

item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and session management.

request.description: Get all users (Admin only).
Get a specific user by ID.
Create a new user (Admin only).
Update a user (Admin only).

Update user account status (Admin only).

**Allowed Values:** Active, Blocked, Suspended
Delete a user (Admin only).
Get all stations (cached 24 hours).

request.description: Get a specific station by ID.
Create a new station (Admin only).

Get all trains with optional filtering.
Get a specific train by ID.

item.name: 04b. Train CRUD (CloudScale)

request.description: Get station ROWID mapping for CloudScale foreign key references.
Get all trains from CloudScale database.

item.name: Get Train by ID or Number

request.description: Get a specific train by ROWID (17-digit) or Train_Number.

response.name: Success (200)
response.body:
{
    "status": "success",
    "train": {
        "ROWID": "31207000000116027",
        "Train_Number": "12951",
        "Train_Name": "Mumbai Rajdhani Express",
        "Train_Type": null,
        "From_Station": "31207000000116007",
        "To_Station": "31207000000116011",
        "Departure_Time": "16:45",
        "Arrival_Time": "08:35",
        "Duration": null,
        "Distance": null,
        "Run_Days": null
    }
}

request.description: Create a new train with automatic station code to ROWID conversion. Required fields: Train_Number, Train_Name, From_Station (code or ROWID), To_Station (code or ROWID), Departure_Time, Arrival_Time.
Create sample trains (12951 Mumbai Rajdhani and 12002 Shatabdi) with automatic ROWID discovery.
Update train fields by ROWID. Supports station code to ROWID conversion for From_Station and To_Station.
Delete a train by ROWID (17-digit CloudScale ID).
Bulk delete all test trains (Train_Number starting with MIN, TEST, or FLD).

item.description: CloudScale train CRUD operations with dynamic station ROWID discovery. Uses 17-digit CloudScale ROWIDs for foreign key references.

request.description: Get all train routes.
Get a route by ID with all stops.

Create a new route (Admin only).

**Lookup:** trainId -> Trains.ROWID
Get all stops for a route.

Add a stop to a route (Admin only).

**Lookups:**
- stationId -> Stations.ROWID
- routeId (path) -> Train_Routes.ROWID
Get all bookings (Admin only).
Get a booking by ID with passengers.
Lookup booking by PNR number (public).

Create a new booking.

**Lookup:** trainId -> Trains.ROWID
Mark booking as paid.
Cancel a booking.
Confirm a booking (Admin only).

Get all bookings for a user.

**Lookup:** userId -> Users.ROWID
Get all fare rules.
Calculate fare for a journey.
Create a new fare rule (Admin only).
Get seat inventory for a train and date.

Create inventory record (Admin only).

**Lookup:** trainId -> Trains.ROWID
Get all quota allocations.
Get all quota type definitions.

response.name: Success (200)

request.description:
Create quota allocation (Admin only).

**Lookup:** trainId -> Trains.ROWID
Get all announcements.

response.name: Success (200)

request.description: Get only active announcements.

Promote a regular user to admin (Admin only).

**Lookup:** userId -> Users.ROWID

**Lookup:** userId -> Users.ROWID
Get all modules with optional filtering.
Get a specific module by ID.

Create a new module (Admin only).

**Rate Limit:** 50 requests/hour

**Lookup:** parentModuleId -> Module_Master.ROWID (optional)

response.name: Success (201)

request.description: Update a module (Admin only).

Delete a module (Admin only).

**Note:** Cannot delete if module has children.

response.name: Has Children (400)

request.description: Toggle module active status (Admin only).
Get modules in nested hierarchical structure.
API root endpoint with version info.

response.name: Success (200)
response.body:
{
    "status": "success",
    "message": "Smart Railway Ticketing System API",
    "version": "2.0.0",
    "runtime": "Zoho Catalyst Functions + CloudScale Database",
    "endpoints": {
        "health": "/health",
        "auth": "/auth/*",
        "users": "/users",
        "trains": "/trains",
        "stations": "/stations",
        "bookings": "/bookings",
        "fares": "/fares"
    }
}
